nodes.name: Webhook - New Lead
nodes.notes: Recibe el lead desde un formulario web o CRM externo

nodes.name: Validate & Enrich Lead
nodes.notes: Valida campos, genera ID único y enriquece datos del lead

nodes.name: AI Qualification (Ollama)
nodes.notes: LLM local con Ollama - sin costo. Cambia a OpenAI si prefieres cloud.

nodes.name: Parse AI Response
nodes.notes: Parsea y valida el JSON del LLM. Tiene fallback si falla el parsing.

nodes.name: Route by Tier
nodes.notes: HOT leads → alerta inmediata. WARM/COLD → flujo estándar

nodes.name: Save to Airtable CRM
nodes.notes: Guarda el lead calificado en Airtable. Plan gratis: 1000 records/base.

parameters.subject: =={{ $json.qualification.tier === 'HOT' ? '🔥 [URGENT] HOT Lead: ' + $json.name + ' - ' + $json.company : $json.qualification.tier === 'WARM' ? '⚡ New WARM Lead: ' + $json.name + ' - ' + $json.company : '📋 New Lead: ' + $json.name + ' - ' + $json.company }}
parameters.message:
=

{{ $json.qualification.tier }} Lead Alert

Score: {{ $json.qualification.score }}/100

Lead Information

Name{{ $json.name }}
Company{{ $json.company }}
Email{{ $json.email }}
Source{{ $json.source }}

AI Qualification

Intent{{ $json.qualification.intent }}
Budget Signals{{ $json.qualification.budget_signals }}
Urgency{{ $json.qualification.urgency }}
Follow Up{{ $json.qualification.follow_up_within }}

Recommended Action

{{ $json.qualification.recommended_action }}

Key Insights

    {{ $json.qualification.key_insights.map(i => '
  • ' + i + '
    • ').join('') }}

Personalized Opener

"{{ $json.qualification.personalized_opener }}"

{{ $json.qualification.risk_flags.length > 0 ? '

⚠️ Risk Flags

    ' + $json.qualification.risk_flags.map(f => '
  • ' + f + '
    • ').join('') + '
' : '' }}
Lead ID: {{ $json.id }} | Processed: {{ $json.processedAt }}

nodes.name: Send Notification Email
nodes.notes: Email HTML con resumen completo del lead calificado

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, leadId: $('Parse AI Response').first().json.id, tier: $('Parse AI Response').first().json.qualification.tier, score: $('Parse AI Response').first().json.qualification.score, message: 'Lead received and qualified successfully' }) }}

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Responde al formulario con confirmación JSON

parameters.text:
=You are a B2B sales lead qualification expert. Analyze the following lead and return ONLY a valid JSON object with no extra text or markdown.

Lead Information:
- Name: {{ $('Validate & Enrich Lead').item.json.name }}
- Company: {{ $('Validate & Enrich Lead').item.json.company }}
- Email: {{ $('Validate & Enrich Lead').item.json.email }}
- Source: {{ $('Validate & Enrich Lead').item.json.source }}
- Message: {{ $('Validate & Enrich Lead').item.json.message }}

Return ONLY this JSON structure:
{
  "score": <number 0-100>,
  "tier": "<HOT|WARM|COLD>",
  "intent": "<description of purchase intent>",
  "budget_signals": "<budget indicators found in message>",
  "urgency": "<High|Medium|Low>",
  "recommended_action": "<specific next step for sales team>",
  "follow_up_within": "<timeframe e.g. 2 hours, 24 hours>",
  "key_insights": ["<insight1>", "<insight2>", "<insight3>"],
  "risk_flags": ["<flag if any, else empty array>"],
  "personalized_opener": "<personalized first contact message>"
}

Scoring guide:
- 80-100: HOT - Clear budget, high urgency, strong intent
- 50-79: WARM - Some signals, needs nurturing
- 0-49: COLD - Vague interest, no clear budget or timeline
